shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "find pages -maxdepth 5 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort; printf '\\n--- Pages API usage ---\\n'; rg -n \"(getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|getInitialProps|next/router|next/head|next/link|next/image|API routes|NextApi|NextPage|InferGet|document|_app|_document|404|500)\" pages components app src 2>/dev/null || true"

/bin/bash -lc "for f in package.json tsconfig.json next.config.ts styles/globals.css components/AppProvider.js pages/_app.js pages/_document.js pages/_error.js pages/404.js pages/index.js pages/blog/index.js 'pages/blog/[id].js' pages/api/posts/index.js 'pages/api/posts/[id].js'; do echo \"--- "'$f"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$f"; done'

/bin/bash -lc "rg --files app components lib pages 2>/dev/null | sort; printf '\\n--- legacy references ---\\n'; rg -n \"next/head|next/router|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|getInitialProps|next/document|NextApi|pages/\" --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' . || true"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && find pages -maxdepth 5 -print 2>/dev/null || true"

/bin/bash -lc 'test ! -e pages && echo '"'pages directory absent'; rg -n \"next/head|next/router|getServerSideProps|getStaticProps|getStaticPaths|getInitialProps|next/document|NextApi|router\\.isFallback\" --glob '"'!node_modules/**'"' --glob '"'!.next/**'"' --glob '"'!tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'"' . || true"
/bin/bash -lc "find app components lib -type f -print | sort; printf '\\nScripts: '; node -p \"Object.keys(require('./package.json').scripts).join(', ')\""

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
